title: $e
text: $e Return the value of e (Euler's number), the base of the natural logarithm $e() Return Values Value of e ( 2.718… ) Use Allowed in all component types. Description The $e function returns the mathematical value of e (2.718...). Example: Using $e The following shows an example using the function $e : vEuler=$e() Copy Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
